response.body:
{
  "id": "{{request.pathSegments.[1]}}",
  "date": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.date'}}",
  "time": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.time'}}",
  "description": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.description'}}",
  "status": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.status'}}",
  
  "courtLocationCode": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.courtLocationCode'}}",
  "courtCode": "{{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.courtCode')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.courtCode'}}{{else}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.courtLocationCode'}}{{/if}}",
  "courtName": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.courtName'}}",
  "criminalJusticeAreaCode": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.criminalJusticeAreaCode'}}",
  
  "durations": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.durations')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.durations'}}{{else}}null{{/if}},
  "entriesCount": 7,
  "entriesSummary": [ { "sequenceNumber": 1, "result": "Adjourned" } ],
  "version": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.version')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.version'}}{{else}}1{{/if}}
}
